name: Pepper-Glazed Cajun Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with Cajun seasoning.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally about 10 minutes, until the chicken is browned.
4. Remove chicken; set aside.
5. To the drippings in the same pan, add green onions and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Add vinegar, hot pepper jelly, and chicken broth; cook, stirring frequently, until the jelly melts.
7. Return chicken to the pan and spoon glaze over the chicken.
8. Cover and cook over medium-low heat, turning several times about 5 minutes, until the chicken is fork-tender.
9. Transfer chicken to a serving platter.
10. Increase heat to medium-high and cook the glaze until it thickens slightly. Spoon over the chicken.
